### Checklist

- [ ] README.md follows the [community template](community/COMMUNITY_TEMPLATE.md) (5 required sections)
- [ ] CONTRIBUTORS.md is filled in with author info
- [ ] .env.example includes all required variables (no real secrets)
- [ ] Code runs end-to-end successfully
- [ ] No hardcoded API keys or secrets
- [ ] Metadata added to `docs/index.yaml` with `category: "community"`
- [ ] Directory is under `community/{subcategory}/project-name/`
